_note: Captured 2026-05-09 — verified via GET to /config/nusoli-valtech/sgedsdemo/main after the POST. The corrected POST body was an array per https://www.aem.live/developer/json2html (the plan-time research had guessed a `models: { article: { ... } }` object shape; the worker actually requires an array of {path, endpoint, regex, template, useAEMMapping?} configs). The path prefix `/articles/` matches incoming delivered URLs; regex `/[^/]+$/` extracts the last segment as `{{id}}`; the worker fetches `/api/assets/sgedsdemo/articles/{{id}}.json` (Author tier Assets API) and renders it through `/cf-templates/article.html` (created in plan 02-04).

request.verify_method: GET (re-fetched after POST to confirm persistence)
